description:
An open-source alternative to Claude Cowork, powered by OpenCode

OpenWork is an extensible, open-source “Claude Work” style system for knowledge workers.
It’s a native desktop app that runs OpenCode under the hood, but presents it as a clean, guided workflow:
- pick a workspace
- start a run
- watch progress + plan updates
- approve permissions when needed
- reuse what works (templates + skills)
The goal: make “agentic work” feel like a product, not a terminal.
Highlights
- Added cloud plugin marketplace import so shared cloud capabilities can be brought into the app flow.
- Improved composer usability with paste chip collapse, atomic slash-command chip deletion, and clearer user message rendering.
Fixes & polish
- Fixed React cloud provider sync and iCloud workspace timeout handling.
- Fixed session resume render loops, inline session error display, and model-change recovery.
- Removed workspace template sharing and related Den template surfaces.
Packaging / ops
- Hardened Electron migration behavior and reduced settings/session log spam.
- Added eval coverage for composer, paste, skills, and related button flows.
- Updated eval preflight to use Electron + Chrome MCP.
Compare:
https://github.com/different-ai/openwork/compare/v0.12.3...v0.12.4
